Selected Work

Projects I'm proud of

📄 CracklePDF Chrome Extension
Chrome Extension UI Design 2024

CracklePDF Extension

View Case Study →

A powerful Chrome extension for PDF processing — merge, convert, compress, and annotate PDFs directly in the browser. Designed with a minimal, fast UI for seamless daily productivity.

🎨 Design System v2
Design Systems Figma 2024

Design System v2.0

View Case Study →

Built a comprehensive design system from scratch — token-based color palette, component library with 80+ components, interaction patterns, and documentation site. Reduced design-to-dev handoff time by 40%.

🎬 Motion Graphics Dashboard
SaaS Dashboard UI 2023

MotionRAG Studio

View Case Study →

An AI-powered motion graphics generation platform. Designed the end-to-end product experience from onboarding through to the multi-step RAG pipeline workspace — handling complex workflows with a clean, intuitive interface.

📱 FinPay Mobile Banking
Mobile Fintech UX Research

FinPay Mobile App

View Case Study →

Redesigned a fintech mobile banking app for Gen-Z users. Conducted 12 user interviews, synthesized insights into a new navigation model, and shipped a dark-mode-first UI that improved task completion rate by 28%.

About

Designing at the intersection of form and function.

I'm a UI/UX Designer & Developer based in India with 3+ years of experience crafting digital products for startups, SaaS platforms, and browser extensions. I believe great design isn't just beautiful — it solves real problems, removes friction, and creates moments that users remember.

Currently building CracklePDF, an all-in-one PDF tool for the browser. Previously collaborated with agencies across India and worked with startups in fintech, edtech, and productivity spaces.

Skills & Tools

Figma Prototyping User Research Design Systems HTML / CSS JavaScript Chrome Extensions Motion Design React Framer
